evidence.description: PhaseDecision struct in protocol/src/orchestrator.rs:1192 has verdict, reason, confidence, risk, evidence — the universal envelope
PhaseDecisionContract + PhaseFieldDefinition in orchestrator-config/src/agent_runtime_config.rs:62 provide YAML-defined field metadata
PersistedPhaseOutput in workflow-runner/src/executor/phase_output.rs persists artifacts to workflow-local .ao/state/workflows/{id}/phase-outputs/
load_prior_phase_outputs() uses pipeline_phase_order for deterministic ordered resolution across phases
Full regression test suite at phase_output.rs:482-691 covering serialization, persistence, and lookup ordering
runtime_contract_builder.rs composes effective phase contracts from YAML in memory

payload.reason: All deliverables from TASK-387 are fully implemented: universal phase envelope (PhaseDecision), YAML-driven field metadata (PhaseDecisionContract), workflow-local artifact persistence (PersistedPhaseOutput), deterministic phase-to-phase handoff (load_prior_phase_outputs with pipeline order), and regression coverage for serialization, persistence, and ordering.
